SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.maven

Class JkMavenProject

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.maven.JkMavenProject
public class JkMavenProject extends Object
Represents a Maven project with various utility methods for performing common tasks.

    Retrieves the project's final file name by executing a Maven command.

    Returns the dependencies of this Maven project as a formatted string suitable to be copy/pasted in jeka.project.deps file.

    • baseDir

      public final Path baseDir

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkMavenProject of(Path baseDir)

    • cleanPackage

      public JkMvn cleanPackage()
      Returns a new JkMvn instance to perform a clean package.

    • cleanInstall

      public JkMvn cleanInstall()
      Returns a new JkMvn instance to perform a clean install.

    • readDependencies

      public JkQualifiedDependencySet readDependencies()
      Returns the dependencies of this Maven project

    • getDependencyAsJeKaCode

      public String getDependencyAsJeKaCode(int codeIndent)
      Returns the project's dependencies as JeKa code.
      Parameters:
      codeIndent - The number of spaces for each indentation level in the generated code.

    • getDependenciesAsTxt

      public String getDependenciesAsTxt()
      Returns the dependencies of this Maven project as a formatted string suitable to be copy/pasted in jeka.project.deps file.

    • mvn

      public JkMvn mvn()
      Returns a new instance of JkMvn to perform Maven commands on this project.

    • getBuildFileName

      public String getBuildFileName()
      Retrieves the project's final file name by executing a Maven command. The method evaluates the Maven expression "project.build.finalName" and extracts its value using the standard output from the executed process. The build file name is generally formatted as groupId-artifactId-version.
      Returns:
      The final file name of the Maven project as a string.

    • getTargetDir

      public Path getTargetDir()
